Settings panel hosting.question: How should the settings panel render?
Settings panel hosting.answer: Full-screen overlay (covers pane area, Esc dismisses, same z-layer as command palette)

Settings panel hosting.question: How does the user open settings?
Settings panel hosting.answer: ⌘, shortcut (also via ⌘⇧P palette + A10 status bar cog)

Settings panel hosting.question: Category nav style?
Settings panel hosting.answer: Fixed sidebar (~160px, always visible, click category → scroll right pane)

Settings panel hosting.question: Search behavior?
Settings panel hosting.answer: Filter to matches (hide non-matching rows, clear search restores full list)
